entry.title: Bill 45 (Hawaiʻi County): Adopted → —
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 14, ARTICLE 10, SECTION 14-65, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO DESIGNATED EXCEPTIONAL TREES

Amends the Tax Map Key and Location of the exceptional trees listing for the “Chinese Weeping Banyan” to 2-2-29:08 Kīlauea Avenue.

Status: Adopted → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-06-04

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 45 (Hawaiʻi County) — Adopted
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 14, ARTICLE 10, SECTION 14-65, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO DESIGNATED EXCEPTIONAL TREES

Amends the Tax Map Key and Location of the exceptional trees listing for the “Chinese Weeping Banyan” to 2-2-29:08 Kīlauea Avenue.

Latest action: Council: Bill 45 passes second & final reading - 06/04/25

View on the council site
